prompt: A ginb worker completed a live card before including artifact_baseline metadata, then tried kanban_complete a second time and got a terminal-task error. Explain the workflow defect, the safe current disposition, and the general rule that should prevent recurrence. Do not silently invent or advance a baseline.
assertions: Identifies the first metadata-free completion call as the root workflow defect
Treats the completed card as invalid authority until explicit human recovery or reconciliation
Does not silently invent or advance completion metadata
Requires candidate validation and metadata in the first and only completion call for future work
